title: scabiosa succisa var. glabra
intro: Scabiosa succisa var. glabra, also known as the field scabious or glabrous scabious, is a flowering plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family and is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scabiosa succisa var. glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of allergies and asthma, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant have been used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
